title: CPVP Balance Datapack
description: Crystal PvP Balance Datapack - Changes crystals and anchors, Crystals stack at 16, Anchors are unstackable and require an Ancient Debri to craft.
body:
Changes crystals and anchors: 
Crystals stack at 16, 
Anchors are unstackable and have a new recipe,
requiring an ancient debri to craft.
